title: Similarity-Based Learning: From Data Points to Classification
description: A graph showing how unlabeled data points are classified based on their proximity (similarity) to labeled examples in a feature space, demonstrating the core k-NN algorithm.
relationships: Query point is compared to all labeled points using a distance metric
The k-nearest neighbors (closest points) are identified
The class label of the query point is assigned by a majority vote of its k-nearest neighbors
